quality: Official university policy documents. Authoritative for institutional practice.

quality: Official GSD program descriptions and policies. Authoritative for institutional practice.
quality: Official Extension School program requirements. Notable for what's absent (oral mandates).
quality: Peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Taylor & Francis). Recent empirical research with strong credibility.
quality: Established teaching organizations (Facing History, Louisiana DOE). Practitioner resources, not peer-reviewed research, but represent widely-used best practices.
